examples: This section of the vertebral column shows prominent "lipping" of the vertebral bodies from osteophyte formation with degenerative osteoarthritis.
The knobby excrescences at the left side of this vertebral column are due to degenerative osteoarthritis. This is the pronounced "lipping" of the vertebral bodies.
Bolton and ther band of bullies have placed high with Sam in recent years, I CNT see them doing anything like that next yr, and maybe even Lipping into the relegation battle.
